label: macro day
description: Whole 160x100 world at noon, fully zoomed out.

label: macro night
description: Whole world at midnight: settlement lights, glow control.

label: mid day
description: Default play zoom (2.2x) on the largest settlement region (Briarcairn) at noon.

label: mid night
description: Same framing at midnight: lighting quality and building visibility.

label: close settlement
description: Close-up of the largest settlement at 4.5x: building art, grounding, glow.

label: close citizens
description: Citizen close-up at 6.5x: can you tell who is working, walking, fighting, resting?

label: winter
description: Mid-winter (snow terrain, snowfall if rolled) over the same region.

label: rain
description: Heavy rain over the largest settlement region, noon, default zoom.

label: active crisis or war
description: War frontier between two civilizations: border friction, skirmish markers, military readability.

label: town upgrade / large settlement
description: Largest 2 (Briarcairn, pop 320) with surroundings: scale fantasy, road connections.
